summary: The walk-in wardrobe is in good, clean decorative order, featuring white emulsioned walls, a grey cut-pile carpet, and built-in wardrobes with wood-effect interiors. Overall cleanliness is to a domestic standard, with only minor cosmetic scuffs and superficial marks observed on the walls and door faces.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Plastered ceiling with white emulsion finish.

items.name: Walls
items.description: White emulsioned plaster walls with matching white timber skirting boards.
defects: Faint hairline scratches and scuffs at mid level (P180)
Faint rub marks and light blemishes at knee level near skirting board (P183, P184)

items.name: Carpeted flooring
defects: Light pile shading from foot traffic

items.name: Entrance door
items.description: White-painted flush timber door, featuring three metal hinges and a modern dark bronze lever handle with matching thumbturn lock.
defects: Minor blemish to low level of door face (P178)
Faint hairline scuffs to door face near handle (P179)
Faint scuff mark to bottom edge of door face (P181)

items.name: Built-in wardrobes
items.description: Multi-compartment built-in wardrobe system with white exterior doors, grey/brown wood-effect laminate interior shelving/frames, and brown-painted back panels. Includes hanging rails and integrated warm-white LED light strips.
defects: Light surface wear to the leading edge of white doors (P189)

items.name: Light switches
items.description: Square, dark bronze/black metallic single gang light switches.

items.name: Threshold strip
items.description: Silver metal threshold transition strip between carpet and wood-effect flooring.

items.name: Clothes hangers
items.description: Assorted pink and black plastic and wire clothes hangers.
